Source.SQL: SELECT itsmApp.ID AS TableID FROM usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation AS itsmAppEsc INNER JOIN usr.ITSMApproval AS itsmApp ON itsmApp.ID = itsmAppEsc.ITSMApprovalID WHERE itsmApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsmApp.IsApproved IS NULL AND itsmApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL AND itsmApp.ApproverType = 'Account' AND DATEADD(DAY, 7, itsmAppEsc.EscalationDateTime) <= GETDATE() AND ( EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRequest WHERE itsmApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRequest' AND itsmApp.TableID = ID AND ActualApproveRoundGuid = itsmApp.ApproveRoundGUID AND State != @DeletedState ) OR EXISTS( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMRelease WHERE itsmApp.FormIdent = 'ITSMRelease' AND itsmApp.TableID = ID AND ActualApproveRoundGuid = itsmApp.ApproveRoundGUID AND State != @DeletedState ) ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT NULL FROM usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation AS itsmAppEscInner WHERE itsmAppEscInner.EscalatedFromEscalationID = itsmAppEsc.ID )

DataSource.SQL: INSERT INTO usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation (AccountID,State,ITSMApprovalID, EscalatedFromEscalationID, EscalatedApproverAccountID, EscalationDateTime) SELECT 1 AS AccountID, 1 AS State, itsmApp.ID AS ITSMApprovalID, itsmAppEsc.ID AS EscalatedFromEscalationID, bossAcc.ID AS EscalatedApproverAccountID, GETDATE() AS EscalationDateTime FROM usr.ITSMApprovalEscalation AS itsmAppEsc INNER JOIN usr.ITSMApproval AS itsmApp ON itsmApp.ID = itsmAppEsc.ITSMApprovalID INNER JOIN dbo.Account AS acc ON acc.ID = itsmAppEsc.EscalatedApproverAccountID INNER JOIN dbo.Account AS bossAcc ON bossAcc.ID = acc.BossAccountID WHERE itsmAppEsc.ID = @ID
